title: TONIFUL 500 Yards Curling Ribbon-Balloon String - Shiny Gold Metallic for DIY Decor, Gift Wrapping, Bows for Christmas, New Year, Birthday, Graduation
features: UNIQUE DESIGN-- The metallic curling ribbon with bright and vivid color, very shiny and glitter, can greatly add to the atmosphere of party and festivals.
MATERIAL-- Made of resistant and smooth plastic material,quality and resistant for long usage life.
CURLING RIBBON SIZE-- 1 roll curling ribbon,the curling ribbon is 5 mm in width and 500 yards in total length,enough for using,you won't have to buy ribbons for months after buying this pack.
WIDELY APPLICATION-- You can apply the curling ribbon for crafts making, wedding party, scrapbooking, ribbons and bows for gifts, flowers, gift wrapping, and any other occasions.
USE FOR FASHION-- You can use these ribbons for fashion! Young girls will love tying these in their hair to themselves look nice. Cheerleaders will love these in their hair too.
description: Curling Ribbon-Balloon Ribbon(500 Yards)-Balloon String for Art&Craft Decor,Gift Wrapping,Ribbons and Bows for Birthday Gifts. ★ABOUT THE BALLOON RIBBON:★ RIBBON WIDTH: 5 mm RIBBON LENGTH: Approx.500 yards PACKAGE INCLUDES:1 Roll Curling Ribbon ★THE BESR GIFT WRAP RIBBONS:★ Great for gift wrapping, party festival Christmas decoration, flowers, florist, DIY crafts, scrapbooking, balloons, wedding party, etc. ★TOP NOTCH SERVICE:️★ TOUIFUL is committed to making you 100% satisfied,we offer: If you have any questions about your purchase, please let us know and we will do our best to help you. 100% quality assurance.30 days are not satisfied with the refund.
